creator: adamw@FreeBSD.org
text:
www/npm has missed the last 22 releases. Many of them are labelled "critical bug".
As a result, I've raised the severity and priority flags.

The attached patch updates to the latest release (1.4.6), created with the clever
'maketar' target. I pointed it at LOCAL/adamw so that I had some place to put the
distfile. You're welcome to keep the Makefile pointed there, or copy it out.

It also updates the github URL... the user is now 'npm'.

sunpoet, if you're not interested in maintaining this port anymore, I'd be happy to.
